chapter: Chapter: Naye Ilaake Mein / Khushboo Rachte Hain Haath (Poetry)

questions.question: ‘Naye Ilaake Mein’ kavita ke kavi kaun hain?
questions.answer: Is kavita ke kavi Arun Kamal hain.

questions.question: Naye ilaake mein kavi kyon bhatak jata hai?
questions.answer: Kyonki vahan roz nayi imaaratein banti hain aur purane nishaan mit jate hain.

questions.question: Kavi ne rasta dhoondhne ke liye kin nishaniyon ka zikr kiya hai?
questions.answer: Peepal ka ped, gira hua ghar aur khali maidan.

questions.question: Shehar mein rozana kya badal raha hai?
questions.answer: Rozana naye makan ban rahe hain aur naksha badal raha hai.

questions.question: Kavi ne shehar ki tulna kis cheez se ki hai?
questions.answer: Kavi ne shehar ki tulna ek aisi jagah se ki hai jo roz 'purani' ho jati hai.

questions.question: Kavi ne rasta dhoondhne ke liye 'Calendar' ka zikr kyon kiya?
questions.answer: Kyonki use lagta hai ki yahan ek din ka waqt ek saal ke barabar badlav lata hai.

questions.question: ‘Khushboo Rachte Hain Haath’ kavita kis par adharit hai?
questions.answer: Ye kavita agarbatti banane wale gareeb mazdooron ke jeevan par adharit hai.

questions.question: Agarbatti banane wale haath kaise hote hain?
questions.answer: Ubhari nason wale, kante hue aur ghisey hue nakhun wale haath.

questions.question: Mazdoor kahan rehte hain?
questions.answer: Vey shehar ke gande nalon ke paas aur kude ke dheron ke beech rehte hain.

questions.question: Duniya ki sabse sundar khushboo kahan banti hai?
questions.answer: Duniya ki sabse gandi bastiyon aur purani galiyon mein.

questions.question: Kavi ne 'Zakhmi haath' kyon kaha hai?
questions.answer: Kyonki lagatar kaam karne se mazdooron ke haath kat-phat jate hain.

questions.question: Agarbatti banane walon mein kis umar ke log shamil hain?
questions.answer: Chhote bachhon se lekar budhe logon tak sabhi shamil hain.

questions.question: ‘Khushboo rachna’ ka kya arth hai?
questions.answer: Iska arth hai agarbatti banana jo doosron ke gharon ko mehkaati hai.

questions.question: Is kavita mein kaun sa bada 'Virodhabhas' (Contrast) hai?
questions.answer: Khushboo banane wale khud gundagi aur badboo mein rehte hain.

questions.question: Kavi ne kin khushboo wali agarbattiyon ke naam liye hain?
questions.answer: Kevda, Gulab, Khas aur Raat-Rani.

questions.question: Naye ilaake mein kavi ko 'Aakhri bharosa' kya hai?
questions.answer: Use bharosa hai ki koi purana jaan-pehchan wala use upar se awaz dega.

questions.question: Mazdooron ki galiyan kaisi hain?
questions.answer: Tang, gandi aur badboodar galiyan.

questions.question: ‘Naye Ilaake Mein’ kavita se kya seekh milti hai?
questions.answer: Ki parivartan bahut tez hai aur purani yaadein dhundhli pad jati hain.

questions.question: Bachhon ke haath kaise bataye gaye hain?
questions.answer: Naye patton jaise komal aur narm.

questions.question: Agarbatti banane wale kya tyag karte hain?
questions.answer: Vey apni sehat aur sukoon tyag kar doosron ke liye khushboo banate hain.

questions.question: Kavi naye ilaake mein rasta kyon bhool jata hai?
questions.answer: Kyonki purani nishaniyan (jaise maidan) ab gayab ho chuki hain.

questions.question: Mazdooron ke nakhun kyon ghisey hue hain?
questions.answer: Lagatar dandi par masala lagane aur mehnat karne ke karan.

questions.question: Is kavita mein samaj ke kis varg ki dasha dikhayi gayi hai?
questions.answer: Samaj ke sabse nichle aur shoshit mazdoor varg ki.

questions.question: Kavi ne 'Smriti' (Yaad) ko kaisa bataya hai?
questions.answer: Yaad ab dhokha dene lagi hai kyonki sab kuch badal gaya hai.

questions.question: Kavita ke ant mein kavi kya sandesh deta hai?
questions.answer: Ki humein un mazdooron ke prati samvedansheel hona chahiye jo hamare jeevan mein khushboo bharte hain.
